text.title: GitHub Actions — Workflow Structure Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Build → test → deploy run sequentially though test and lint could parallelize.
antipattern.fix: Model as DAG; needs only for true dependencies.

antipattern.symptom: Five PR pushes queue five test runs; budget wasted.
antipattern.fix: Add concurrency with group per ref + cancel_in_progress: true on PRs.

antipattern.symptom: Deploy job ships to prod with no approval, no audit trail.
antipattern.fix: Add environment: with approvers for prod.

antipattern.symptom: Nightly drifts an hour on DST.
antipattern.fix: Switch to UTC + document expected wall-clock.
